text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the second to last day of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I have no strength left in my legs...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan, here... Lean on me... for support...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much, but you're also looking
worse for wear...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan! Chiyono O! Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... This is normal... for me... Give me a
moment, and I'll be... right as rain!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't push yourselves so hard. Ardan,
you can hardly stay upright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're correct, of course. I'm aware I've been
overexerting myself to some extent, as I've been
training since morning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But the day of my race is approaching, so I must
make up for lost time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You're racing again?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I've decided to compete in the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm planning to return to the track soon too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You are? Then that means...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! At long last, I can show the
world my running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I bet there'll be people who would look at me and
go, "Who's that again?" But that's better than
being forgotten completely.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oguri won over everyone's heart before I realized
what was happening. Now people have even
started to call her and Creek the leaders of this
generation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Nobody even cares who won the Satsuki Sho or
Japanese Derby anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I even started to wonder if that precious moment,
that all-important crown we strove to attain at
any cost, was but a fleeting dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm deeply ashamed the thought crossed my mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But even then, one small ray of hope still existed
for us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And that ray is you, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You never stopped racing. It's as if you've been
running in defiance of Oguri and the others—as if
to challenge the world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You saved a space for us to return to, just as you
promised.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The sight of you running true to your style, even
amidst all the cheering for Oguri... It gave me
courage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It made me want to run with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It made me want to go out there and show
everyone a performance they'll never forget
instead of fearing I'll be forgotten!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Once Chiyono O and I make our return, the three
of us who once battled at the Japanese Derby will
be reunited.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The world may know Oguri, Inari, and Creek as
the Eternal Top Three, but I'd say we're more than
qualified to be called the "top three" ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What say we take them head-on... as equals?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The top three...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Thus, I've been training all this time
to be able to carry that title.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's a limit to how much I can do, but I've
been training even harder than I was before the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm finally returning to racing, I'm planning
to run with everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I already burned up once at the Japanese Derby,
so I'm not about to start worrying about it now.
To fall on the turf would be a fitting end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If the zenith of my life must coincide with its end,
so be it! I will use that moment to shine brighter
than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to push myself beyond my limits so
I don't lose to you, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(They're both prepared to put everything on the
line! Even their very lives...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Am I truly content to stay the way I am?)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (No, there is no way I can remain like this!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sei! Yah! Hup! Tah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This feels so great...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I think I'll do another lap.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Wow.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She's so relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's as if she runs as easily as she breathes—a
natural act that is engraved into her instincts and
her very being.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She simply runs.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's almost as if she runs with no ego—like she's
meditating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Such a style is unattainable to someone like me
who harbors such a fierce inner blaze.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She's also beloved by fans near and far.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We're polar opposites in every aspect. But that is
exactly why I'm so determined.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wish to defeat Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wish to surpass her and bask in that same
spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wish to defeat the one who has no ego yet is
praised as the best there is.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wish to prove my own strength in victory!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And then... I want to usher in a new era alongside
Chiyono O and Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Together as the top three, we shall become the
pillars that support the new generation!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For this, I will need strength! A technique,
weapon—something in my arsenal.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I can already see the form it shall take... Yes...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to obtain it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the last day of summer camp, Yaeno Muteki
pulls me away from attentive ears as soon as she
sees me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've made a decision and would like you to hear
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wish to fully embrace the torrent of emotions
within me and see if I can't turn them into the
kind of strength I need to exceed my limits.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If it's possible I can transform them into a weapon
that'll allow me to defeat Oguri and make a name
for myself as part of the top three, then...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wish to pursue this possibility!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's eyes burn with a red-hot fervor as
she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in them, I can see exactly how resolute her
mind is.
choice_data_list: All right. Let's give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wishes to embark on this endeavor, then I
promise to support her with all the necessary
preparations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've thought through all the possible ramifications
and formulated appropriate countermeasures.
While there's no guarantee that unexpected
mishaps won't arise...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my job as her trainer to encourage and
support her decision!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with Yaeno Muteki's declaration of her
resolve, this year's summer camp draws to a close.
